channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head & Sierra Nevada: Life and Limb – Ep. 105
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: Sam had a few bottles of beer on his desk in Milton and "Life and Limb" was one of them ... it's definitely a special beer.
item.content:encoded: Sam had a few bottles of beer on his desk in Milton and “Life and Limb” was one of them … it’s definitely a special beer.

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: I wasn't able to get any "Life and Limb" but did bring back some "Wrath of Pecant" and "My Antonia" (plus four bottles of their craft distilled spirits). All excellent.
item.content:encoded: I wasn’t able to get any “Life and Limb” but did bring back some “Wrath of Pecant” and “My Antonia” (plus four bottles of their craft distilled spirits). All excellent.

item.title: By: Cory
item.dc:creator: Cory
item.description: Maple syrup is pretty much 100% fermentable and contributes almost no flavor.
item.content:encoded: Maple syrup is pretty much 100% fermentable and contributes almost no flavor.

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Sam is one of a kind - the new show should be good!
item.content:encoded: Sam is one of a kind – the new show should be good!

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description: I just toured the Brewery in Milton and got to drink World Wide Stout at the brew pub. Sam is a genius!
item.content:encoded: I just toured the Brewery in Milton and got to drink World Wide Stout at the brew pub. Sam is a genius!

item.title: By: Quinn Phillips
item.dc:creator: Quinn Phillips
item.description: I have two bottles of Life & Limb aging in the fridge. I intend not to open them for a couple of years. Cheers!
item.content:encoded: I have two bottles of Life & Limb aging in the fridge. I intend not to open them for a couple of years. Cheers!
